_README: WHERE the arm goes comes entirely from each task's scene-context .md (the
waypoints); the robot simply follows those waypoint positions in order.
This file ONLY sets how many sim steps the arm spends reaching each named
waypoint - more steps = slower, smoother motion. A waypoint not listed here
uses a built-in default. Tasks fall back to '_default' for anything unset.
waypoint_steps : { waypoint-name: sim steps to spend reaching it }
gripper_closed : per-finger close target (m). Lower = closes more (smaller
objects); raise if it crushes/shoves. Fully open is fixed
at 0.04 (the Franka finger limit), so only this is tunable.
planner : default planner when --planner is omitted (diffik/rmpflow/curobo/rrt).
release_at_waypoint : name of the waypoint where the gripper OPENS (releases the
object). Default = the last waypoint. Set it earlier to place the
object and then retreat with the gripper already open (e.g. open on
the scale tray at 'waypoint4', then move up to 'waypoint5').
Joint physics is not configured here. It comes from task_data/physics/<task>.json.
